positive: A whimsical and harmonious arrangement featuring a majestic golden retriever puppy sitting surrounded by stylized floral elements, such as watercolor roses, peonies, and eucalyptus leaves. The dog should be depicted in a clean, crisp silhouette style, against a soft, gradient sage green and cream background. Composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, suitable for a repeating, single-focus apparel print. Use clean lines, high contrast between the subject and background, and vibrant, yet pastel, color accents in the florals. Studio lighting, vector art aesthetic, illustration style.
negative: low quality, blurry, text, signature, watermark, noise, artifacts, ugly, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photographic, photorealism, monochrome
